title: thisを指定してラベルを作る

input.factory: () => ({ tool: { makeLabel(left, right) { return this.prefix + left + "-" + right + this.suffix; } }, card: { prefix: "#", suffix: "!" }, parts: ["A", "7"] })

cases.name: 接頭辞だけがあるラベル

input.factory: () => ({ tool: { makeLabel(left, right) { return this.prefix + left + "-" + right + this.suffix; } }, card: { prefix: "ID:", suffix: "" }, parts: ["X", "9"] })

cases.name: 接尾辞だけがあるラベル

input.factory: () => ({ tool: { makeLabel(left, right) { return this.prefix + left + "-" + right + this.suffix; } }, card: { prefix: "", suffix: "点" }, parts: ["10", "20"] })
() => ({ tool: { makeLabel(left, right) { return this.prefix + left + "-" + right + this.suffix; } }, card: { prefix: "user-", suffix: "?" }, parts: ["min", "max"] })
